calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for and with George Chew.

Mr. Lew stated that Mr. Chew waives notice of the amended petition and is okay with fees. Mr. Chew responded yes. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for George Chew.

The petition for final distribution was continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to file an amended petition.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
